title: UI Component Reference — NXGN Actions Web
purpose: **AI Summary**: Catalog of shared @nxgn-solutions/ui components and Actions-local components. Standalone admin list pages use nxgn-grid-page-title plus nxgn-server-grid with server-side paging/search/sort; routed capture pages use nxgn-capture-page-title plus NxGN form fields; embedded child collections inside capture pages use nxgn-data-grid. All visible UI strings use shell-delivered translation keys via @ngx-translate/core; no hardcoded English in templates or component code.

rules.rule_text: Admin configuration modules must use NxGN UI primitives for list, capture, and child-grid surfaces: nxgn-server-grid for lists, nxgn-capture-page-title for capture, and nxgn-data-grid for embedded child rows.

sections.title: Component Selection Rule
content: **Always use `@nxgn-solutions/ui` components first.** Only build a custom Actions-local component when the shared library does not provide the required functionality.
| Shared library has the component | Use it directly — do not wrap or re-implement |
| Shared library component is close but missing a feature | Use it and request the feature upstream — do not fork or wrap |
| No shared library component fits | Build an Actions-local component in `shared/components/` |

Actions-local components should provide **reusable functionality specific to the Actions solution** (e.g., org-switcher, tenant-scoped data filter, permission tree). They should NOT duplicate general-purpose UI (grids, form fields, page titles, confirmation dialogs) that `@nxgn-solutions/ui` already provides.
- Follow the same signal-based patterns as `@nxgn-solutions/ui` components ([ADR-0006](../../adr/0006-signal-based-state-over-behaviorsubject.md))
- Place in the feature directory if only used by one feature

sections.title: Prerequisites
content: These packages **must be installed** before using any components. See [Overview — Required Packages](overview.md#required-packages) for setup instructions.
| `@nxgn-solutions/ui` | `@nxgn-solutions/ui` | Grid, form fields, page titles, confirmation dialogs |

sections.title: `@nxgn-solutions/ui` Components
content: Use `GridPageTitleComponent` from `@nxgn-solutions/ui` above every standalone admin list page. The title and any custom button labels are translated by the component/template caller before binding.
Use `CapturePageTitleComponent` from `@nxgn-solutions/ui` for routed create/edit pages. Bind translated entity names and translated add/edit prefixes where the component exposes text inputs.

Standalone admin list pages must use the Actions `ServerGridComponent` wrapper around the NxGN server-side grid contract. Lists bind a POST `/grid-list` endpoint, stable `ColDef<T>[]`, page size, selected rows, loading/degraded state, and grid callbacks. Search, sort, and paging stay server-side; the browser must not load all rows and filter locally.

List components must guard edit/delete/double-click when the grid is in a degraded state or the event has no row data. Selection should be normalised through `getSelectedServerRows(...)` so both direct array events and AG Grid API events work.

Use `DataGridComponent` from `@nxgn-solutions/ui` only for child collections that live inside a capture page and are saved as part of the parent aggregate, such as workflow states/transitions, compliance profile rules, or deadline alert rows. Embedded child grids can use local signal arrays because the parent save endpoint persists the full aggregate.

Use `TextFieldComponent`, `TextAreaFieldComponent`, `DropdownFieldComponent`, `CheckboxFieldComponent`, date/URL/email/password fields, and related controls from `@nxgn-solutions/ui`. Labels, placeholders, helper text, option labels, validation messages, empty states, toasts, and confirmation text must come from the shell-delivered Actions translation contract and resolve through `@ngx-translate/core`.

Dropdown options come from module lookup endpoints. If the backend returns semantic names, the component may translate the display name through module-owned keys, but enum values themselves remain server-owned.

Use `confirm(...)` for localized destructive actions and supply translated `confirmLabel` and `cancelLabel`. Do not use `confirmDelete(...)` in localized admin UI because its built-in button label is outside the Actions translation contract.

sections.title: Actions-Local Components
content: Components specific to the Actions domain, built within this project. These live in their respective feature folders (not in `shared/`) unless reused across features.
| `PriorityBadgeComponent` | actions | `app-priority-badge` | Color-coded priority badge (Critical, High, Medium, Low) |
| `StatusTimelineComponent` | actions | `app-status-timeline` | Visual timeline of action status transitions |
| `EvidenceUploadComponent` | evidence | `app-evidence-upload` | Drag-and-drop evidence file upload with type selection |
| `ComplianceScoreComponent` | compliance-profiles | `app-compliance-score` | Visual compliance score indicator (percentage + color) |
| `EscalationChainComponent` | escalation-rules | `app-escalation-chain` | Visual display of escalation rule chain |

sections.title: Design Tokens
content: All styling uses `--actions-*` CSS custom properties defined in `_design-tokens.scss`. Components MUST use tokens — never hardcode colors, spacing, or typography values.

sections.title: Common Patterns
content: A standalone admin list page uses:
- `nxgn-server-grid` for server-side paging, search, and sort.
- Stable `columnDefs` with translated headers resolved through `TranslateService` and recomputed when the translation revision changes.
- `ConfirmationDialogService.confirm(...)` with translated labels for destructive commands.
- `nxgn-capture-page-title` for save/cancel and optional domain commands.
- Bootstrap cards and grid utilities for section layout.
- NxGN form field components for every supported input.
- `nxgn-data-grid` only for embedded child collections owned by the aggregate.
- The client aggregate-root pattern: fetch lookup data and the aggregate root in parallel, stitch the editable aggregate client-side, then submit a complete Save request to the module save endpoint.
- Translation keys for every visible string; persisted default values must be deterministic identifiers, not translated labels.

Large admin datasets use the server-side grid-list contract. Do not add bespoke client-side search or pagination to new list pages. If a shared component does not expose required server-side behavior, request it from the NxGN UI team and keep the local wrapper thin.

sections.title: Key Rules
content: | Bootstrap grid for layout | `row g-3` plus `col-md-*` for form field layout |
| Cards for capture sections | `card` > `card-header` plus `card-body` for logical capture sections |
| Built-in control flow | Use `@if`, `@for`, and `@switch`; do not add legacy `*ngIf` or `*ngFor` in new code |
| Server-side list grids | Use `nxgn-server-grid` and `/grid-list` endpoints for standalone list pages |
| Embedded child grids | Use `nxgn-data-grid` only for child collections saved with the parent aggregate |
| Translation contract | All visible text goes through `@ngx-translate/core` and ActionsTranslationKeys |
| Functional DI | `inject()` rather than constructor injection |
| Signal state | `signal()` for local state and `computed()` for derived values |
| Stable column definitions | Do not allocate a new non-computed column definition array on every change detection pass |
| Degraded grid guards | Disable or ignore edit/delete/double-click when server-grid loading is degraded |
| `ToastrService` | Page-level success/error after save or domain command |
| Inline alert | Validation errors, API error messages, and in-progress states |
| `ConfirmationDialogService.confirm(...)` | Destructive actions with translated message/title/confirm/cancel labels |

All notification messages, confirmation copy, grid empty/search text, form labels, helper text, validation text, and toasts must use translation keys. No hardcoded English in templates or component code.

sections.title: Departures from Capstone
content: | Component library | Local wrappers such as `app-entity-grid-page-title` and `app-nxgn-grid` | Published `@nxgn-solutions/ui` components plus thin Actions wrappers where needed | Actions consumes the shared NxGN UI package directly |

| Standalone list grids | Client-side grid wrappers in older modules | `nxgn-grid-page-title` plus `nxgn-server-grid` and `/grid-list` endpoints | Large admin datasets require server-side paging/search/sort |
| Embedded child rows | Same grid primitive as list pages | `nxgn-data-grid` inside capture pages only | Child rows are local aggregate state until parent Save |

| Translation | Component-specific translation loading | Shell-delivered ActionsTranslationKeys resolved by `@ngx-translate/core` | One application-wide language contract and no hardcoded UI English |
| State management | Class fields and `@ViewChild` grid references | Signals (`signal()`, `computed()`) | ADR-CORE-0006 |
| DI style | Constructor injection | `inject()` | Modern Angular standalone component style |
| Design tokens | Bootstrap defaults | `--actions-*` custom properties | Actions branding and identity-module alignment |

sections.title: See Also
content: - [Overview](web-overview.md) - Project structure, required packages, component conventions

- [Capture Page](capture-page.md) - Routed create/edit page pattern using `nxgn-capture-page-title` plus form fields
- [Feature Service](feature-service.md) - Service colocation, method categories, EnumDTO/NamedDTO models
- [Validation](validation.md) - Per-field computed errors, duplicate detection, and localized confirmation dialogs
- [Embedded List](embedded-list.md) - Child grid pattern within capture pages
- [Capture State](capture-state.md) - State preservation for child routes
- [Mockup Conventions](mockup-conventions.md) - ASCII mockup rules for design docs
